global.description: The ad features a dark geometric background with a prominent logo and call-to-action.
global.main_message: Encouraging viewers to watch trending content with a clear call-to-action.

elements.label: Dark geometric background
elements.description: A dark background featuring various geometric shapes in shades of gray.

elements.label: MoonScreen logo
elements.description: A stylized logo with the text 'MoonScreen' prominently displayed in a modern font.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A large circular shape in the center, filled with a muted gray color.

elements.label: Square shape
elements.description: A medium-sized square shape in the center, also filled with a muted gray color.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' in a simple, bold font, positioned at the top.

elements.label: Trending text
elements.description: Text reading 'Watch what's trending' in a bold, white font, centrally positioned.

elements.label: Cancel anytime text
elements.description: Smaller text below the main message that reads 'Cancel anytime' in a lighter font.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Watch now' in a bold font.

elements.label: Small circles
elements.description: Three small circles arranged horizontally, filled with a light gray color.

elements.label: Edge element
elements.description: A thin vertical strip at the far right edge of the canvas.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline text 'Watch what's trending' is bold and centrally aligned.

elements.label: MoonScreen text
elements.description: The logo text 'MoonScreen' is displayed in a modern font at the top.

elements.label: Watch now text
elements.description: A call-to-action text 'Watch now' at the bottom, inviting users to engage.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label 'UGC' positioned at the top left corner.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, dark geometric with modern elements, MoonScreen logo, trending text, call-to-action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Watch what's trending, Cancel anytime, MoonScreen, Watch now, UGC
